_comment: Ryan Realty Market Report Video Generator — Config File Format
_usage: Pass this file to generate_market_report.sh via: ./generate_market_report.sh --config this_file.json
_photos_comment: Provide 3-10 high-quality photos. Script cycles through them if more stat cards than photos.
_stat_cards_comment: Each card = headline (top), value (center, in gold), context (bottom). Ordered by viral tier — lead with the strongest stat. Recommend 5-8 cards for a 23-35 second video.

stat_cards.headline: Seller Concessions
stat_cards.context: Nearly half of closings include seller help

stat_cards.headline: Price Per Sq Ft
stat_cards.context: vs $401/sqft in Bend — same Central Oregon life

stat_cards.headline: Monthly Payment
stat_cards.context: PITI estimate at today's rates (20% down)

stat_cards.headline: FHA or VA Financing
stat_cards.context: First-timers and veterans closing every week

stat_cards.headline: Days to Pending
stat_cards.context: Average time from list to under contract

_city_configs._comment: Copy this block and update for each city. Use one config file per city.

_photo_sources._comment: Recommended photo sources for each city
_photo_sources.redmond: Snowdrift Visuals — Redmond neighborhood folder in Drive
_photo_sources.lapine: Snowdrift Visuals — La Pine neighborhood folder in Drive
_photo_sources.sisters: Snowdrift Visuals — Sisters neighborhood folder in Drive
_photo_sources.sunriver: Snowdrift Visuals — Sunriver neighborhood folder in Drive
_photo_sources.prineville: Snowdrift Visuals — Prineville neighborhood folder in Drive
_photo_sources.bend: Snowdrift Visuals — Bend neighborhood folders (19 neighborhoods) in Drive
_photo_sources.google_drive_path: 06_Marketing & Brand → Marketing → Media → Web Site → Area Guides

_stat_selection_guide._comment: Pull stat values from the corresponding *_ytd_stats.md file in this folder
_stat_selection_guide.tier_order: Lead with Tier 1 stats from the Recommended Video Stats section of each .md file
